goal.objective: Rebind V12 dogfood and immutable release-review evidence to the complete revision chain after revision 4 closed the cold runtime-purity defect.

assumptions.statement: ADR 0005 and the Specialist Run contract are the complete implementation authority.
assumptions.rationale: Architecture fan-in passed and no blocking decision remains.

assumptions.statement: After native apply_patch fails before mutation, the host may perform an exact precondition-hash-guarded PowerShell write inside the approved scope.
assumptions.rationale: Foundation Revision 1 proved the temporary worktree patch helper is unavailable while bounded escalated PowerShell writes remain auditable and fail closed.

assumptions.statement: All runtime, persistence, Git, merge, and memory effects remain external to core.
assumptions.rationale: V12 is a pure evidence session, not the deferred universal scheduler.

acceptanceCriteria.description: Make canonical V12 dogfood execute the exact successful revision-4 package while preserving and measuring the complete revision-1 through revision-4 replan chain.

evidenceRequirements.description: Provide exact package/handoff/replan authentication, successful revision-4 create-record-restore-inspect evidence, deterministic replay, every AC8 friction metric, syntax, format, and focused regression evidence.

acceptanceCriteria.description: Make the immutable R2 release-review harness verify and expose the complete partial, split, and pass correction lineage and include the release-gate wrapper in canonical format and lint coverage.

evidenceRequirements.description: Provide syntax, strict lineage verification, immutable snapshot coverage, direct primary-source coverage, package-script coverage, format, and no-summary-only release evidence.

contextSources.description: Accepted immutable Specialist Run Session decision.
Existing bounded canonical JSON and framed digest primitives.
Current visible IDE specialist workflow.
Current module catalog guidance.
Existing package scripts and export map.
Current concise public product surface.
Verified upstream aggregate-resource PASS handoff that changed bound runtime sources.
Exact owner approval for the original release-correction package.
Exact revision-1 dogfood-harness PASS handoff.
Original owner-approved release-correction package whose downstream contract was retired.
Exact owner approval for the revision-2 package.
Verified revision-2 SPLIT handoff with the bounded V11 first-use filesystem diagnosis.
Owner-approved revision-2 package that produced the verified split diagnosis.
Trace of the retired revision-1 contract and revision-2 replacement result.
Complete revision-2 SPLIT handoff report.
Exact owner approval for the revision-3 package.
Verified revision-3 SPLIT handoff identifying the package-reconstruction schema read.
Owner-approved revision-3 package that produced the package-reconstruction split.
Trace of the revision-2 split and revision-3 scope expansion.
Complete revision-3 SPLIT handoff report.
Exact owner approval for the final runtime-purity correction package.
Verified revision-4 PASS handoff closing the cold zero-read defect.
Owner-approved final runtime-purity correction package.
Trace of the revision-3 split and successful revision-4 replacement.
Complete revision-4 PASS handoff report.
Exact revision-1 release-evidence PASS handoff.
Verified incomplete revision-1 report with the retired runtime contract absent.
Current candidate-bound canonical gate wrapper.
Current candidate-bound R2 release-review preparation and compilation harness.
Current exact R2 reviewer handoff verifier.
Attempt-1 exact raw reviewer handoff verifier.
Attempt-1 release-review compiler and approval harness.
Exact lifecycle/correctness release-review FIX handoff.
Exact product/API/IDE release-review FIX handoff.
Exact security/trace/authority release-review FIX handoff.
Complete package-bound attempt-1 release-review routing report.
Frozen normative Specialist Run contract.
V12 deterministic inspection implementation.
Frozen V12 session creation, restoration, and validation foundation.
V12 handoff transition implementation.
Frozen V12 run-session wire and public types.
Existing package-bound raw handoff and fan-in implementation.
Existing rendered package verification and manifest resolution.
Existing V11 compiler, package, and handoff types.
Frozen V12 verification obligations.
Exact current Audit-B approval bytes required for release replay.
Current synthetic and obsolete revision-1 implementation dogfood harness.
Frozen V12 feature specification.
Exact V12 verification package approval.
Exact raw V12 adversarial-verification handoff.
Exact raw V12 IDE-dogfood handoff.
Approved V12 verification implementation package.
Complete V12 verification implementation handoff report.

forbiddenEffects: Do not use network access, change Git state, launch descendants, write outside the exact scope, or claim that core performs host effects.

workUnits.objective: Make canonical V12 dogfood execute the exact successful revision-4 package while preserving and measuring the complete revision-1 through revision-4 replan chain.

module.action: Replace the obsolete four-handoff revision-1 finalization path with an approval-bound V12 session over the revision-4 package and exact PASS handoff; independently authenticate revision 1's three PASS handoffs, revision 2 and 3 SPLIT handoffs, every replan, and the revision-4 PASS; preserve the synthetic regression and report all AC8 metrics plus replans, retired contracts, scope additions, and prevented unsafe launches without claiming host effects.

stopConditions: If native apply_patch fails before mutation because of the host sandbox, an exact precondition-hash-guarded PowerShell write is allowed within the declared write scope; verify the resulting file bytes immediately.
Return only the concrete closed SpecialistAgentHandoff JSON shape from the generated contract.
Run only local focused verification allowed by the contract and report every failing command truthfully.
Stop if any declared source is unavailable or fails its exact digest and byte binding.
Write only the exact declared write scope; do not change Git state, use the network, launch descendants, or widen the public contract.

workUnits.objective: Make the immutable R2 release-review harness verify and expose the complete partial, split, and pass correction lineage and include the release-gate wrapper in canonical format and lint coverage.

module.action: Extend candidate snapshots and primary-evidence verification across revision 1's expected retired agent, revision 2 and 3 complete SPLIT routes, revision 4 PASS, and the eventual complete revision-5 package; fail closed on any unexpected roster or outcome, keep raw bytes direct, and add scripts/run-v12-release-gate.mjs to format, format-check, and lint without changing the gate's semantics.
